findings.summary: load_goldsets walks only one directory level, so each step directory is treated as a single case (case_id == step) — the goldsets/<step>/<case-id>/ layout is collapsed to one case per step and any second case is unreachable
BASELINE_FILE is BASELINES_DIR / '.json' — the model name was dropped, so every model reads and overwrites the same literal .json baseline file
Default paths are bogus absolute roots: goldsets_dir=/agents/evals/goldsets and runs_dir=/eval-runs do not exist on any host; defaults only work when every caller overrides them

_cmd_run writes scorecards next to the goldsets inside the package (settings.goldsets_dir.parent) instead of runs_dir, and write_scorecard uses runs_dir/<model>/ so successive runs overwrite each other
